Title: AI Software Engineer
Description: • Architected and deployed scalable AI solutions using Azure OpenAI and Azure Cognitive Services, enhancing threat intelligence analysis and automating data-driven mitigation strategies. • Implemented Document Intelligence workflows to extract and structure unstructured data, significantly reducing manual processing time and improving data reliability for downstream ML models. • Developed RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures by integrating Azure AI Search with LLMs, enabling rapid and accurate information retrieval for security vulnerability reports.

Title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
Description: • Designed and implemented ETL processes for security logs and vulnerability reports, enhancing risk analysis capabilities. • Leveraged machine learning to analyze threat intelligence data, uncovering patterns for data-driven mitigation strategies. • Developed data ingestion systems for endpoint and network security, improving data reliability and integrity. • Created monitoring dashboards for cloud security, ensuring compliance and safeguarding sensitive information.

Title: Solutions Engineer
Description: • Served as the primary technical liaison for client field trials, bridging hardware constraints (antennas/PCBs) with AI software requirements.  • Customized IoT product demonstrations using Python scripting to simulate client use cases, highlighting the value of AI-enhanced signal processing.  • Demonstrated AI-driven analytics capabilities, showcasing how edge data could be leveraged for predictive maintenance and operational efficiency.

Title: User Test
Description: • Conducted user testing for ColorOS Beta and Alpha versions, ensuring software quality from 5.0 to 12.1.   • Identified and reported bugs, enhancing user experience and functionality.   • Suggested new features based on user feedback, contributing to product innovation.   • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve software performance and reliability.

Title: Student Intern
Description: • Contributed to the development of a high-speed 64-bit binary comparator, enhancing processing efficiency. • Collaborated with a team of engineers to troubleshoot and optimize design parameters, ensuring project milestones were met. • Demonstrated strong analytical skills and a commitment to learning, resulting in positive feedback from supervisors.

Title: IoT Engineer in R&D
Description: • Executed end-to-end testing of connected embedded devices, validating firmware stability, network connectivity, and sensor data integrity under varying bandwidth conditions. • Developed automated test scripts (using Python) to simulate real-world IoT usage scenarios, reducing manual testing time by 20%. • Analyzed communication protocols (e.g., TCP/IP, UDP) to troubleshoot latency issues in real-time data transmission, ensuring high-quality user experiences. • Collaborated with R&D teams to identify hardware-software interoperability bugs during the Alpha/Beta stages, resulting in a 20% reduction in post-launch defects.
